name: CH32H416RDU6
description: Generated from the WCH CH32H416 parser pipeline for CH32H416RDU6 QFN60X6. Includes synthesized routing extracted from Table 2-1-2 CH32H416 Pin definitions. CH32H416RDU6 is a CH32H416 MCU in a 60-pin QFN60X6 package. This generated definition includes 55 peripheral blocks covering ADC with 16 input channels, CAN, 10M Ethernet, 4 I2C buses, 3 op-amps, USB full-speed, 3 SPI buses, and 8 serial ports.
